text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: Oh my. A gift for me? How very kind of you.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
Thank you very much, Goddess Statue. I shall
repay you in kind.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: By showing you a dazzling victory. ♪
